view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a temporary booking page that expires after the meeting is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a temporary booking page that expires after the meeting is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement by confirming that the system generates a temporary link for a one-off meeting, which expires after the meeting is completed. The linked use case explicitly states that the system generates a temporary link (e.g., biz.ing/abc123-expires-24h) that auto-deletes 24 hours after the scheduled meeting, thus fulfilling the requirement. This is directly supported by the evidence provided in the linked use case and the scenario described.
